metadata.title: Multi-Region L4 + SkyPilot Official Skill + Stale Workflow Archive
metadata.priority: P0 — unblocks the 12+ hour PENDING factorial jobs

phase.name: Multi-Region L4 with ordered: failover
phase.description: europe-north1 has NO L4 GPUs. Switch to ordered: preference list across 6 regions (3 EU + 3 US) for maximum spot availability.

task.title: Add ordered: region failover to train_factorial.yaml
task.red: test_factorial_yaml_has_ordered_regions — verify train_factorial.yaml has ordered: or any_of: with multiple regions (not just cloud: gcp). test_factorial_yaml_prefers_eu — verify EU regions come before US. File: tests/v2/unit/deployment/test_skypilot_yamls.py (add tests)
task.green: Replace the single `cloud: gcp` + `accelerators: L4:1` with: ```yaml ordered: - accelerators: L4:1 region: europe-west4 - accelerators: L4:1 region: europe-west1 - accelerators: L4:1 region: europe-west3 - accelerators: L4:1 region: us-central1 - accelerators: L4:1 region: us-east1 - accelerators: L4:1 region: us-west1 cloud: gcp use_spot: true ``` IMPORTANT: Verify this parses with sky.Task.from_yaml() BEFORE committing.

task.title: Update YAML contract to allow ordered: with multiple regions
task.red: test_yaml_contract_allows_ordered — verify contract validation passes with ordered: blocks (currently may reject as unauthorized keys). File: tests/v2/unit/deployment/test_yaml_contract_enforcement.py
task.green: Update configs/cloud/yaml_contract.yaml to allow ordered: key and the specific EU+US regions. Update validate_yaml_contract.py to handle ordered: blocks correctly.

task.title: Update .sky.yaml controller to not conflict with ordered:
task.red: Verify sky.Task.from_yaml() parses the new YAML with the current .sky.yaml controller config. No infra/cloud conflicts.
task.green: Ensure .sky.yaml controller region (europe-west1) doesn't conflict with the job's ordered: regions.

task.title: Fetch and follow SkyPilot skill install guide
task.action: 1. Fetch https://github.com/skypilot-org/skypilot/blob/HEAD/agent/INSTALL.md 2. Follow the installation steps for Claude Code 3. Verify skill is loaded: check available skills list 4. Run bootstrap: verify SkyPilot CLI + credentials detected

task.title: Update experiment-harness to reference SkyPilot skill
task.action: Add to experiment-harness SKILL.md metadata: ```yaml depend_on: - factorial-monitor - ralph-loop - skypilot # Official SkyPilot skill (Layer 0) ``` Update Phase 2 VALIDATE to note SkyPilot skill provides authoritative YAML schema knowledge.

task.title: Move 5 stale workflows to .github/workflows/archived/
task.action: ```bash mkdir -p .github/workflows/archived git mv .github/workflows/build-env_image.yml .github/workflows/archived/ git mv .github/workflows/build_train_image.yml .github/workflows/archived/ git mv .github/workflows/build-jupyter_image.yml .github/workflows/archived/ git mv .github/workflows/test_dataload.yml .github/workflows/archived/ git mv .github/workflows/test_train.yml .github/workflows/archived/ ```
task.red: test_no_stale_workflows_in_active_dir — verify only ci-v2.yml and docker-build-gate.yml remain in .github/workflows/ (not archived/).

execution-order.step: Cancel existing PENDING jobs, relaunch with multi-region YAML
